/usr/bin/c++ -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/preproc.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/preproc.dir/home/runner/work/sa2/sa2/tools/preproc/asm_file.cpp.o CMakeFiles/preproc.dir/home/runner/work/sa2/sa2/tools/preproc/c_file.cpp.o CMakeFiles/preproc.dir/home/runner/work/sa2/sa2/tools/preproc/charmap.cpp.o CMakeFiles/preproc.dir/home/runner/work/sa2/sa2/tools/preproc/preproc.cpp.o CMakeFiles/preproc.dir/home/runner/work/sa2/sa2/tools/preproc/string_parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/preproc.dir/home/runner/work/sa2/sa2/tools/preproc/utf8.cpp.o CMakeFiles/preproc.dir/home/runner/work/sa2/sa2/tools/preproc/ext/gbagfx/jasc_pal.cpp.o -o preproc
